# ContentBlockTypes.IsKnown method

Returns `true` when *type* is a known, supported content discriminator. A receiver SHOULD treat unknown types as unsupported content, not as errors (R-14.4-b).

```csharp
public static bool IsKnown(string type)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| type | The candidate discriminator. |

## Return Value

`true` when the type is one of the five known content types.
